nuggets.headline: Jamee Cornelia founded L7 Records with her hip-hop collective Visibly Inflight
nuggets.text: After her time as a lead vocalist for the punk band Howling Star, Jamee Cornelia also formed a hip-hop collective called Visibly Inflight for her solo work. Today, she continues to release music and direct videos, while she and her friends from Visibly Inflight run their own indie label, L7 Records. The label's name, L7, is a nostalgic nod to a store Jamee wanted to open for her clothing company back in high school in Marietta Square.

source.title: Conversations with the Inspiring Jamee Cornelia
source.quoteSnippet: I was also a lead vocalist for a punk band called Howling Star for 4 years and we started our own concert series called Punk Black while I was also in a hip-hop collective called Visibly Inflight for my solo work. Currently, I still release solo music under Jamee Cornelia as well as direct music videos and me and the friends of the group I use to be in called Visibly Inflight run our own indie label “L7 Records” named after this store I wanted to open up for my clothing company back in high school at Marietta Square.

nuggets.imageCaption: Jamee Cornelia's creativity extends beyond music.

nuggets.headline: Jamee Cornelia makes things "look cool" with multi-media curation
nuggets.text: Beyond her music, Jamee Cornelia is celebrated for her unique video editing style and dynamic live performances. She prides herself on her "Multi-Media curation," often saying she's adept at crafting compelling visuals with film and graphics. This expansive skill set means she also helps artists on her L7 Records label with comprehensive "roll out" planning and content creation.

source.title: Conversations with the Inspiring Jamee Cornelia
source.quoteSnippet: I am probably most known for my video editing style and my live performances since I have shows a lot. What I’m most proud of is Multi-Media curation. I’m really good and making things look cool with film and graphics, lol! I shoot film as well and help an artist with the label my and my friends started with “roll out” planning and content curation.

nuggets.headline: H31R shares Jamee Cornelia's spirit of reinventing hip-hop
nuggets.text: Much like Jamee Cornelia, who consistently breaks barriers and reinvents the hip-hop subgenre, the duo H31R operates in a similar alternative hip-hop space. Both artists explore emotional depths and deliver frank, direct lyrics, creating music that keeps listeners on the edge of their seats by blending appealing beats with thought-provoking words.

source.title: Jamee Cornelia - Songs, Events and Music Stats | Viberate.com
source.quoteSnippet: Jamee Cornelia offers the industry a new and alluring sound with her distinctive fusion of Hip Hop and Alternative Hip Hop.She effortlessly combines appealing beats with thought-provoking words to create music that connects with listeners. Because they never know what to anticipate next, Jamee Cornelia's audience is always on the edge of their seats. She stands apart from other musicians in the Hip Hop arena thanks to her flexibility. Jamee Cornelia bravely delves into the depths of her emotions in her music, which serves as a reflection of her own path. Her lyrics are frank and direct, striking a deep and lasting chord with listeners. Jamee Cornelia is bound for success in the music business thanks to her contagious enthusiasm and remarkable talent. Watch out for this budding artist as she keeps breaking down barriers and reinventing the Hip Hop subgenre.

artistSummary: Jamee Cornelia, a multi-faceted artist from Marietta, GA, is carving out her own space in hip-hop and alternative hip-hop. Beyond her distinctive solo music, she's an accomplished music video director and co-founder of the indie label L7 Records.
